SPRight.name: ViewOrphanCorrelator
SPRight.Description: Grants read-only access to the Orphan Account Correlator plugin page, navigation icon, and scan results. Does NOT permit correlating accounts.

SPRight.name: CorrelateOrphanAccount
SPRight.Description: Grants permission to perform correlation actions: re-point an orphan account to a real identity (directly or via bulk), delete an emptied dummy identity, and send a match to a manager for approval. Assign only to operators trusted to change account-to-identity links.

Capability.name: OrphanCorrelatorAdmin
Capability.Description: Full access to the Orphan Account Correlator plugin (view AND correlate). Assign to IAM administrators who need to review and correlate orphaned accounts. For review-only staff, assign the View right alone instead.
